'''Muunilinst''' was was a [[Star/Legends|star]]<ref name="SPP">''[[Specter of the Past]]''</ref> located within the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories']] [[Muunilinst system/Legends|Muunilinst system]].<ref name="Loc">''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' establishes that [[Muunilinst/Legends|Muunilinst]] was located in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] and in the [[Muunilinst system/Legends|Muunilinst system]]. As the [[Star/Legends|sun]] [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] the [[Planet/Legends|planet]], it must be located in the Outer Rim's Muunilinst [[Star system/Legends|system]].</ref> It was [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] by the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Muunilinst/Legends|Muunilinst]], the headquarters of the [[InterGalactic Banking Clan/Legends|InterGalactic Banking Clan]], from which it could be seen.<ref name="SPP" /> In [[19 ABY/Legends|19 ABY]],<ref name="TERC">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of ''[[Specter of the Past]]'' to [[19 ABY/Legends|19 ABY]]</ref> [[Imperial Remnant]] [[Supreme Commander (Galactic Empire)/Legends|Supreme Commander]] [[Gilad Pellaeon/Legends|Gilad Pellaeon]] saw Muunilinst's light dimming while two [[Golan III Space Defense NovaGun|Golan III platforms]] passed in front of the star.<ref name="SPP" />

{{Star-stub}}
